data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. EXPLORER TIKO is a capable type and proved too strong last time to win by one length at this track in a handy 17.31 beating Opawa Birstall. Is very reliable out of the lids and is the one to beat again. 2. RIPSLINGER LYNX filled the minor placings again last time when second (17.23) at this track, making it three straight minors on end. Has a good record at this journey. Rates a winning chance on best. 8. OPAWA CONNOR was strongly fancied last time on the back of some good recent form but could only manage second (17.17) at this track. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Likely to be in the finish again.","runners":[7,2,8],"exclusive":false}
